title: Security
page_subheading: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, and active sessions.
password_description: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
two_factor_description: Add an extra layer of security to your account. When signing in, you will need a code generated by your authenticator app.
two_factor_scan_instruction: Scan the QR Code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) and enter the generated code to confirm.
two_factor_code_invalid: The code entered is invalid. Please try again.
recovery_codes_warning: Keep these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
two_factor_disable_confirm: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This reduces your account security.
sessions_revoke_all_confirm: Are you sure? All other sessions will be terminated.
delete_account_description: Once you delete your account, you will lose access immediately. Your data will be preserved for 30 days before permanent deletion.
delete_modal_description: This action is irreversible. After confirming, you will be logged out immediately and your account will be deactivated.
delete_soft_delete_notice: Your data is preserved for 30 days. Contact support within this period if you wish to reactivate your account.
